zh.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter是Filip Filipsson和Ingeborg Karlsdotter的女兒，出生。她於1295年4月11日之前與Magnus Gregersson在瑞典結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1328年2月之後在瑞典。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter是Filip Filipsson和Ingeborg Karlsdotter的女儿，出生。她于1295年4月11日之前与Magnus Gregersson在瑞典结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1328年2月之后在瑞典。

nameMeanings.name: Ingegärd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + garðr ‘enclosure, stronghold’.

historicEvents.description: King Eriksson died. Valdemar crowned King. Birger Jarl declared regent until Valdemar is of age.

historicEvents.title: Earliest Mention of Stockholm
historicEvents.description: The earliest known recorded history of the city of Stockholm is in Norse sagas as Agnafit which dates to 1252. The city rose to prominence due to Baltic trade. Stockholm is now the most populous urban area in the region.

historicEvents.title: The Hatuna Games
historicEvents.description: A conflict on September 29, 1306, between Birger, King of Sweden, and his brothers, the dukes Eric Magnusson and Valdemar Magnusson is known as The Hatuna Games. The brothers arrived to a party late in the night at King Birger's estate. The dukes captured and imprisoned Birger and his wife in Nykoping Castle's dungeon. Duke Eric then gained power over Sweden.

en.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter was born as the daughter of Filip Filipsson and Ingeborg Karlsdotter. She married Magnus Gregersson before 11 April 1295, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 3 daughters. She died after February 1328, in Sweden.

fr.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter est née, fille de Filip Filipsson et Ingeborg Karlsdotter. Elle a épousé Magnus Gregersson avant 11 avril 1295, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après février 1328, à Suède.

de.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter wurde, als Tochter von Filip Filipsson und Ingeborg Karlsdotter geboren. Sie hat vor 11. April 1295 in Schweden Magnus Gregersson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach Februar 1328 in Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter è nata il come figlia di Filip Filipsson e Ingeborg Karlsdotter. Lei sposato Magnus Gregersson prima del 11 aprile 1295, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il febbraio 1328, nel Svezia.

ja.lifeSummary: Ingegärd FilipsdotterはFilip FilipssonとIngeborg Karlsdotterの娘として生まれた。1295年4月11日以前にスウェーデンでMagnus Gregerssonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1328年2月以後にスウェーデンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter(은)는 Filip Filipsson(와)과 Ingeborg Karlsdotter의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1295년 4월 11일 이전 스웨덴에서 Magnus Gregersson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1328년 2월 이후 스웨덴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter nasceu filha de Filip Filipsson e Ingeborg Karlsdotter. Ela casou-se com Magnus Gregersson antes 11 de abril de 1295, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após fevereiro de 1328, em Suécia.

ru.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter родилась. Её родителей звали Filip Filipsson и Ingeborg Karlsdotter. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Magnus Gregersson перед 11 апрель 1295 г. в местности Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после февраль 1328 г. в местности Швеция.

sm.betw 1328-1330: mai le 1328 e o'o I le 1330
sm.bet 1328-1330: mai le 1328 e o'o I le 1330

es.lifeSummary: Ingegärd Filipsdotter nació como hija de Filip Filipsson y Ingeborg Karlsdotter. Se casó con Magnus Gregersson antes de 11 de abril de 1295, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de febrero de 1328, en Suecia.
